evals.prompt:
ok so i just finished a question-me session about my expense tracker idea and here's what we came up with:

## Refined Intent
Build a personal CLI expense tracker in Python...

plan it!
evals.expected_output: A task_plan.md file with 5-6 phases, populated Decisions Made table, Key Questions, and a brief execution summary.
assertions: Output file is named task_plan.md
Goal section present with one clear sentence matching refined intent
Phases section with 3-7 phases, each with checklist items and status
Decisions Made table populated from question-me output
Key Questions section carries over open questions
Phase 1 status is in_progress, others are pending
Errors Encountered table present
Current Phase tracking present

evals.prompt: hey i ran question-me on my personal site deployment setup... make a plan please
evals.expected_output: A task_plan.md with phases for Hugo/Vercel deployment, decisions table, and key questions.
assertions: Output file is named task_plan.md
Goal section present with one clear sentence matching refined intent
Phases section with 3-7 phases, each with checklist items and status
Decisions Made table populated from question-me output
Key Questions section carries over open questions
Phase 1 status is in_progress, others are pending
Errors Encountered table present
Current Phase tracking present

evals.prompt: just had someone grill me on migrating our postgres database... plan it out for me
evals.expected_output: A task_plan.md with phases for DB migration, decisions table, and key questions.
assertions: Output file is named task_plan.md
Goal section present with one clear sentence matching refined intent
Phases section with 3-7 phases, each with checklist items and status
Decisions Made table populated from question-me output
Key Questions section carries over open questions
Phase 1 status is in_progress, others are pending
Errors Encountered table present
Current Phase tracking present

evals.prompt: i need a plan for building a multi-tenant SaaS dashboard with real-time analytics. this is a complex software project. plan it out
evals.expected_output: A task_plan.md with the tracer bullets approach: minimal setup Phase 1, tracer bullet E2E slice in Phase 2, user sign-off gate, decisions table, and key questions.
assertions: Output file is named task_plan.md
Goal section present with one clear sentence
Phase 1 described as minimal setup or just enough to orient and prepare to run
Phase 2 described as an end-to-end vertical slice or tracer bullet through all layers
User feedback or sign-off referenced after Phase 2
Decisions Made table populated
Errors Encountered table present
Current Phase tracking present
